body.title: agent_datacenter: document installer bootstrap decision (deferred to Phase 4)
body.result: docs/decisions/installer-bootstrap.md written and pushed. Paradox stated clearly. v0 bridge = igor launcher (not a device). Phase 4 target = agentctl init, pip install, ubuntu+macOS, no igor dep, Postgres found or Docker fallback.
body.description:
Document the installer bootstrap paradox decision so Phase 1-3 can proceed without resolving it.

Paradox: the installer is a device on the rack; the rack is what the installer installs. Something outside the datacenter must bootstrap v0.

Decision (agreed 2026-04-27):
- v0 bridge: existing igor launcher (~/TheIgors/igor bash script + first_start.py) — already works, not a device, lives outside agent_datacenter
- Target (Phase 4): agentctl init — pip install agent_datacenter && agentctl init bootstraps a working empty rack on a clean machine (ubuntu + macOS)
- Constraints on Phase 4 target: no igor required, portable, works at work

Proposed shape:
- Write docs/decisions/installer-bootstrap.md:
  - The paradox stated clearly
  - v0 bridge description (igor launcher, not a device)
  - Phase 4 target spec (agentctl init, pip install, ubuntu+macOS, no igor dep)
  - What 'init at work' must accomplish: skeleton up, IMAP up, Postgres found or Docker fallback

Affected files:
- ~/dev/src/agent_datacenter/docs/decisions/installer-bootstrap.md (new)

Design rules:
- None apply — design doc only

Scope boundary:
IN: decision doc only
OUT: any code — agentctl init is T-adc-portable-bootstrap, Phase 1 (gated on skeleton)

Test plan:
- Doc exists with decision clearly stated and Phase 4 target described
- No code written in this ticket
